rationale: Fingerprint matches n-version generator: `function(e){let n=new Set, t=e.split("\n").slice(1); for(let i of t){...} return Array.from(n).map(...)}`. Feed `""`: `"".split("\n").slice(1) = []`, loop never runs, `Array.from(new Set()).map(...) = []`. Rust `split_lines+filter_empty+json_extract(sentinel)` on `""` yields `[]`. Both empty.
